name: A+brownies
recipeInstructions:
To make the base:
1. In a large bowl, combine sugar and butter; beat until creamy.
2. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and salt; mix well.
3. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt 1 and 1/4 cups of the mini chocolate chips until smooth.
4. Add melted chocolate and flour to the first mixture. Pour into a greased 9 x 9 inch square pan. Set aside.
To make the topping:
1. In a small bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and butter; beat until creamy.
2. Add eggs, milk, flour, and almond extract; beat well.
3. Stir in the remaining 3/4 cup of mini chocolate chips.
4. Pour over the brownie base.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes. Cool completely and cut into small pieces. These are very rich and taste best if chilled. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 16 to 24 brownies.
